About Lendermarket

It all began with a simple idea: investing should be easier, more rewarding and open to everyone.

Lendermarket empowers people to start investing in peer-to-peer loans. We connect investors with trusted digital finance companies offering high returns, no hidden fees and a secure environment.

Create account
Learn more

Meet the Team

Lendermarket is guided by a team of experts with extensive experience in the financial and tech sectors – this means your investments are in good hands

Carles Federico

Chief Executive Officer

LinkedIn profile

Carles brings over 15 years of experience in the fintech industry, specialising in scaling digital companies. A key part of his career was at Skype, where he played a significant role during its global expansion. His understanding of how to drive innovation within fast-growing tech companies is integral to Lendermarket’s success. Carles’s ability to create strategic plans and foster collaborative teams makes him a visionary leader who is guiding Lendermarket to new heights in the P2P lending space.

Gerad Kostak

Head of Growth

LinkedIn profile

Gerad’s background spans across tech and military leadership, including pivotal roles at Glia, where he drove business development for a platform used by Fortune 500 companies. His military service as a United States Marine Corps Infantry Officer shaped his strategic thinking and resilience, enabling him to thrive in high-pressure environments. With a degree in Psychology, Gerad brings a unique blend of emotional intelligence and analytical thinking to Lendermarket, ensuring its continued growth and stability (did we also mention his regular 18 km runs on weekends?).

Helari Laurent

Chief Technology Officer

LinkedIn profile

Helari has led engineering teams at Glia and Bob W, both known for their rapid growth and technological innovation. At Glia, he helped develop cutting-edge digital engagement tools used by global financial institutions, while Bob W, scaled operations across 10 countries, raising over €30M in investment. At Lendermarket, Helari’s focus on engineering and cybersecurity is transforming the platform. He has led the development of a new microservices-based architecture that enhances scalability, performance, and security, ensuring investor data and transactions are protected at every stage.

Aldar Tsybikov

Head of Finance

LinkedIn profile

Aldar brings a strong financial background from his previous experience as Investment research Analyst at Tinkoff Investments, where he managed wealth and investment strategies. Aldar worked in different financial institutions where he contributed to the growth of their fintech divisions. His education includes a Master’s degree in Financial Economics from Lomonosov Moscow State University, along with certifications such as Level I of the CFA Program. With deep expertise in financial modelling, corporate finance and financial markets, Aldar ensures that Lendermarket offers secure, high-return and transparent investments for its users.

Legal

Lendermarket Limited is regulated by the Central Bank of Ireland. Registered with the Companies Registration Office in Block C, 77 Sir John Rogerson’s Quay, Dublin, D02 VK60, Ireland. Company number 585178.

Lendermarket Limited provides services regulated under Regulation EU 2020/1503 (the Crowdfunding Regulation) as well as services not covered by the Crowdfunding Regulation. For more information, please read our Services Statement and the Risk Disclosure Statement.

As with all investment opportunities, investments on the Lendermarket platform involve a degree of risk. Lendermarket advises carefully evaluating the risks associated with investing in consumer and business loans and seeking professional advice before starting to invest on the platform. We accept our managers and employees as investors. Our staff have the opportunity to invest in all crowdfunding offers on Lendermarkets platform. The firm ensures that any such investments are made under the same conditions as those of all other investors and that staff do not enjoy any preferential treatment or privileged access to information.

We accept our managers and employees as investors. Our staff have the opportunity to invest in all crowdfunding offers on Lendermarkets platform. The firm ensures that any such investments are made under the same conditions as those of all other investors and that staff do not enjoy any preferential treatment or privileged access to information.

Lendermarket offices: Germany: Quartier Potsdamer Platz, Haus 2, Potsdamer Platz 10, 10785 Berlin. Spain: Paseo de la Castellana 141, 5ª planta, 28046 Madrid. France: Tour CB21, 16 Place de l’Iris, La Défense, 92400, Courbevoie, Paris. Estonia: Sadama tn 4, 10111 Tallinn.

When signing up with Lendermarket, you agree to the Rules of the Platform, Risk Disclosure Statement, Privacy Policy, Services Statement and Cookie Policy. You can update your Privacy Settings. All Rights Reserved © 2026 Lendermarket Limited.
